whatsapp_bot_app     meu-bot-whatsapp-app   "docker-entrypoint.s…"   app       12 hours ago   Up 5 minutes            0.0.0.0:50010->50010/tcp, [::]:50010->50010/tcp
whatsapp_bot_db      postgres:15-alpine     "docker-entrypoint.s…"   db        12 hours ago   Up 12 hours (healthy)   5432/tcp
whatsapp_bot_redis   redis:7-alpine         "docker-entrypoint.s…"   redis     12 hours ago   Up 12 hours             0.0.0.0:6379->6379/tcp, [::]:6379->6379/tcp

cmd: set -eu; for p in /app/server.js /usr/src/app/server.js /home/node/app/server.js ./server.js; do if [ -f "$p" ]; then echo "$p"; exit 0; fi; done; find /app /usr/src/app /home/node/app -maxdepth 4 -name server.js 2>/dev/null | head -n 1

if command -v sha256sum >/dev/null 2>&1; then sha256sum '/usr/src/app/server.js' | awk '{print $1}'; else node -e "const fs=require('fs');const c=require('crypto');console.log(c.createHash('sha256').update(fs.readFileSync(process.argv[1])).digest('hex'))" '/usr/src/app/server.js'; fi

set -eu; for p in /app/server.js /usr/src/app/server.js /home/node/app/server.js ./server.js; do if [ -f "$p" ]; then echo "$p"; exit 0; fi; done; find /app /usr/src/app /home/node/app -maxdepth 4 -name server.js 2>/dev/null | head -n 1

if command -v sha256sum >/dev/null 2>&1; then sha256sum '/usr/src/app/server.js' | awk '{print $1}'; else node -e "const fs=require('fs');const c=require('crypto');console.log(c.createHash('sha256').update(fs.readFileSync(process.argv[1])).digest('hex'))" '/usr/src/app/server.js'; fi

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="pt-BR" class="h-full">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>CRM Enterprise | Super Admin</title>
    
    <!-- TailwindCSS (Design) -->
    <script src="https://cdn.tailwindcss.com"></script>
    <script>
        tailwind.config = {
            darkMode: 'class',
            theme: {
                extend: {
                    colors: {
                        primary: '#10b981', // Emerald 500
                        secondary: '#3b82f6', // Blue 500
                        dark: '#0f172a'
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    </script>

    <!-- Alpine.js (Interatividade) -->
    <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/alpinejs@3.x.x/dist/cdn.min.js"></script>
    
    <!-- FontAwesome & Socket.IO -->
    <link href="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/font-awesome/6.4.0/css/all.min.css" rel="stylesheet">
    <script src="/socket.io/socket.io.js"></script>
    
    <!-- Estilos Embutidos (Garante carregamento) -->

        /[asterisco] Fundo Padrão WhatsApp [asterisco]/
        .bg-chat-pattern {
            background-color: #e5ddd5;
